rationale: Gov't Code §2252.901 governs contracts with former or retired state agency employees. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: A state agency may not enter into an employment contract, a professional services contract under Chapter 2254, or a consulting services contract under Chapter 2254 with a former or retired employee of the agency before the first anniversary of the last date on which the individual was employed by the agency, if appropriated money will be used to make payments under the contract.
_note: Rule text concerns employment/professional services contracting restrictions; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
